title: hieracium floribundum subsp. islandicum
intro: Hieracium floribundum subsp. islandicum, also known as the island hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits associated with the island hawkweed include the potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
